doc.description:
Estimate local position from UWB anchor measurements.
UWB devices can be used for communication, ranging, and positioning. This module consumes anchor measurements and estimates a local position. With range measurements, 3 anchors are required/supported by the current trilateration path.
See https://hal-enac.archives-ouvertes.fr/hal-01936955 for more information on the EKF filtering.

configure.name: UWB_POSITIONING_USE_AS_LOCAL_POS
configure.description: use as a local positioning system (default: TRUE)

configure.name: UWB_POSITIONING_USE_AS_GPS
configure.description: use as a fake GPS positioning system (default: FALSE)

define.name: ANCHORS_IDS
define.description: Comma separated list of anchors ID

define.name: ANCHORS_POS_X
define.description: Comma separated list of anchors ID over X axis

define.name: ANCHORS_POS_Y
define.description: Comma separated list of anchors ID over Y axis

define.name: ANCHORS_POS_Z
define.description: Comma separated list of anchors ID over Z axis

define.name: RANGE_OFFSET
define.description: Offset applied to individual range measurements

define.name: RANGE_SCALE
define.description: Scale factor applied to individual range measurements

define.name: INITIAL_HEADING
define.description: Initial heading correction between anchors frame and global frame

define.name: NB_ANCHORS
define.description: Set number of anchors, only 3 are required/supported at the moment

define.name: USE_EKF
define.description: Enable EKF filtering, required to estimate speed

define.name: EKF_R_SPEED
define.description: EKF noise on speed measurements (if available)

define.name: NOISE_X|Y|Z
define.description: Noise level reported by the POSITION_ESTIMATE message when USE_AS_LOCAL_POS is activated

define.name: VEL_NOISE_X|Y|Z
define.description: Noise level reported by the VELOCITY_ESTIMATE message when USE_AS_LOCAL_POS is activated

makefile.raw: ifeq (,$(findstring $(UWB_POSITIONING_USE_AS_GPS),0 FALSE)) ifdef SECONDARY_GPS ifneq (,$(findstring $(SECONDARY_GPS), uwb_positioning)) # this is the secondary GPS $(TARGET).CFLAGS += -DGPS_SECONDARY_TYPE_H=\"modules/decawave/uwb_positioning.h\" $(TARGET).CFLAGS += -DSECONDARY_GPS=GPS_UWB else $(TARGET).CFLAGS += -DGPS_TYPE_H=\"modules/decawave/uwb_positioning.h\" $(TARGET).CFLAGS += -DPRIMARY_GPS=GPS_UWB endif else # plain old single GPS usage $(TARGET).CFLAGS += -DGPS_TYPE_H=\"modules/decawave/uwb_positioning.h\" endif endif
